nasb.text: Turn your eyes away from me, For they have confused me; Your hair is like a flock of goats That have descended from Gilead.

esv.text: Turn away your eyes from me, for they overwhelm me— Your hair is like a flock of goats leaping down the slopes of Gilead.

cnv.text: 請你轉眼不要看我， 因為你的眼使我心動！ 你的頭髮如同從基列山下來的山羊群。

ccb.text: 求你把视线移开吧， 因为你的眼波使我迷乱。 你的秀发像从基列山坡下来的山羊群。
